sku_id: SEESE Car Wash Foam Gun for Garden Hose, Foam Cannon Car Wash Kit with High Pressure Nozzle

segments.prompt:
Create a 10-second vertical TikTok-style ad video.
Timeline:
0-3s: Show a real-life wrong behavior: a person crouched beside a dark car in a sunlit driveway, dipping a sponge into a gray dirty bucket of water, scrubbing a car door with thin watery suds streaking down the paint. Close-up details amplify the pain — murky water splashing, sponge squeezing out weak foam, hand wiping sweat from forehead, streaky water spots visible on the car door.
3-6s: Quickly introduce the SEESE car wash foam gun as the direct solution. The lime yellow-green and black foam gun with transparent soap cup enters frame connected to a garden hose. Thick white foam sprays across the car panel, the dirty surface turning completely white with rich cleaning foam. The white SEESE logo is visible on the black collar.
6-10s: Fast-cut scene 1 — close-up of thick white foam clinging to the car surface, the SEESE foam gun in hand spraying even foam coverage across the hood, suds cascading down the panels with satisfying texture.
Do not start with a perfect product shot.
Do not end with a CTA in this segment.
Keep the pacing fast, clear, and product-focused.
Use the provided product reference images as the exact product identity.

segments.negative_prompt: Slow pacing, smooth cinematic transitions, text overlays, voiceover, cartoon effects, 3D render, unnatural colors, pressure washer machine, fake foam, missing SEESE logo, wrong product colors

segments.prompt:

8-10s: Short CTA — text overlay reading 'Professional foam wash at home. SEESE.' on a clean final result background. Light, minimal, natural CTA style.
